t_en: Evolution

t_ch: 不可思议的进化，或将让海螺报恩的故事成为现实
t_en: An unbelievable evolution that may well make true the tale of the conch repaying its debt.
Materials: Conch meat, chitin shell
Star Calendar Year <unbreak>8093</unbreak>
Guess~ Who~ I~ Am~
Jimsonweed.
Belobog Caveman.
The researcher growing grass.
I am~ The researcher growing grass!

t_ch: 贪婪的学者获得了他梦寐以求的长生，只是，他现在的味道变得有一点…好吃。
t_en: The insatiable researcher received his long-held dream of immortality. However, he ended up developing a somewhat... delicious aroma.
Part one of the Growth series

t_ch: 作者以自己为载体，浑身散发着蓬勃的艺术朝气
t_en: The artist has used their own body as the receptacle, exuding a dense artistic vitality.

t_ch: 材质：囚犯，草本植物，禾本植物
t_en: Materials: Convict, herbs, grasses
Star Calendar Year <unbreak>7801</unbreak>
Guess~ Who~ I~ Am~
An out-of-control wooden dummy.
March 7th's senior.
This thing counts as a criminal, too?
I am~ An out-of-control wooden dummy!

t_ch: 木人桩得意地向你招招手，邀你与它比上一场，如果它真有手的话。
t_en: The wooden dummy would be proudly beckoning you to battle... If it had hands...
Dummy Master statue series

t_ch: 这是自动木人桩的战斗，你无权插手
t_en: This is a battle with an Automatic Wooden Dummy. You have no authority to intervene
Materials: Wood
Star Calendar Year <unbreak>7533</unbreak>
Guess~ Who~ I~ Am~
An enemy from overseas.
The decadent giant.
Is this even scientifically possible?
I am~ The decadent giant!

t_ch: 自出生起，我便秉受丰饶的赐福，令我的体型远远超越常人。然后我发现，自己恐高。
t_en: I have been blessed with Abundance since birth, which caused my body to grow far larger than the average person's. It was then that I discovered I'm scared of heights...
Part two of the Growth series

t_ch: 成长的美感总是要划定在一定的界限内
t_en: The beauty of growth must always exist within a set limitation

t_ch: 材质：服用违禁丹药后的囚犯
t_en: Materials: A criminal who ingested forbidden medication
Period unknown
Guess~ Who~ I~ Am~
A highly explosive incense holder.
Arahabaki's head.
A drill for home renovation.
I am~ A highly explosive incense holder!

t_ch: 作为一个香炉，它无疑是成功的。点燃的瞬间，所有香客都在急救室见到了帝弓。
t_en: Its performance as an incense holder was unquestionable. The moment it was lit, all the worshipers could see the Reignbow from inside the emergency room.
The Vessel of Rage

t_ch: 我的心中仍有一股无名之火
t_en: There remains a nameless flame in my heart
Materials: Incense burner, incense ash
Star Calendar Year <unbreak>7011</unbreak>
Guess~ Who~ I~ Am~
Singer in the stone.
Amah rock.
A sealed bust.
I am~ The singer in the stone!

t_ch: 石碑上的歌者狰狞地狂笑着，身体左右摇摆，让你想起了鮟鱇鱼头顶的饵。
t_en: The singer on the stone tablet wears a hideous and wild smile. Their body sways side-to-side like the lure on the head of an angler fish.

t_ch: 四角方正的硬质屏幕，因此得名「四方览镜」，不过是民用版。仙舟语言真的很好懂。
t_en: The Foursquare Mirror, which is the civilian version, is named after its screen in square shape. The Xianzhou dialect is very easy to understand.

t_ch: 能够遍览四方的硬质屏幕，因此得名「四方览镜」，不过是民用版。仙舟语言真的很难懂。
t_en: The Foursquare Mirror, which is the civilian version, is named after its screen that allows its users to view every corner of the world. The Xianzhou dialect is very confusing.

t_ch: 仙舟人称其为「四方览镜」——可它不就是个电子显示屏吗？
t_en: People in Xianzhou call it a Foursquare Mirror. Isn't it just an electronic display?

t_ch: 笨重的电子显示屏。除了用于广告轮播或展示重要信息外，还能让整个洞天看起来充满科技感。
t_en: It is a bulky electronic display. Besides being used to display advertisements and important announcements, it can make the delve look futuristic.
Distant Ballad

t_ch: 当人们都已淡忘妖魔的传说
t_en: For when humanity forgets about stories of ghosts and demons.
Materials: Stone, human (we think...)
Period unknown
Guess~ Who~ I~ Am~
The great ape thief.
Dr. Primitive.
Lionape.
I am~ The great ape thief!

t_ch: 在星星的最高处，猿猴偷走了它深爱的公主，但它无处可逃，只能被现实锁住。
t_en: At the very highest point of the starry sky, the great ape thief kidnapped his beloved princess. However, with nowhere to run, he was sealed in place by reality.
Beauty and the Thief

t_ch: 跨越种族的悲恋与单相思
t_en: A tragic story of unrequited love between different species
Materials: Gray Ape
Star Calendar Year <unbreak>7901</unbreak>
Guess~ Who~ I~ Am~
The bound convict.
A convicted television host.
A veteran that readily admits his crimes.
I am~ The bound convict!

t_ch: 离间盟约，颠覆仙舟，跪缚于此，遭万人唾弃，纵千年万年，永不可恕。
t_en: Sewing discord among the alliance, subversion of the Xianzhou, they are fated to be bound here for millennia and hated by all, never to be forgiven.
Kneel

t_ch: 这世上存在着不可宽恕的罪
t_en: There are sins in this world that cannot be forgiven
Materials: Convict, torture devices
Period unknown
Guess~ Who~ I~ Am~
The ultimate drifter.
A mushroom.
Who am I? Where was I going?
I am~ The ultimate drifter!

t_ch: 生命很长，刑期更长，百无聊赖的犯人蜷缩成一团，任凭枝叶在大脑中生长。最终，他放弃了思考。
t_en: Life is long, but his sentence is even longer. The convict was pushed to a level of boredom that inspired him to curl up into a ball and allow branches and leaves to grow in his brain. In the end, he gave up on thought altogether.
Thought

t_ch: 唯有停止思考才能浇灭永恒的疯狂
t_en: Only by stopping their thoughts can one eliminate eternal madness
Materials: Convict
Period unknown
Guess~ Who~ I~ Am~
A cylindrical washing machine.
A robotic archway.
Daniel Kim
I am~ A cylindrical washing machine!

t_ch: 洗衣机的转轴一刻不停地旋转，可名为世界的衣服却从来不曾干净。
t_en: Though the washing machine never stops spinning, the clothes we call "the world" are never clean.
Clean
It is not me that it is dirty. It is this world.
Materials: Aurumaton
Star Calendar Year <unbreak>7500</unbreak>
Guess~ Who~ I~ Am~
A man-made cyborg.
A Xenohydro.
A motivator who shouts really loud.
I am~ A man-made cyborg!

t_ch: 在一次次的最优解中，电子脑成功杀死了意识，从计算的傀儡成为了这具身体的主人。
t_en: After continuous optimization, the electronic brain successfully killed off the original consciousness and changed from being a puppet governed by calculations to the master of its own body.
Substitution

t_ch: 不要让算法取代你的选择
t_en: Do not allow the algorithm to make your choices for you
Materials: Human, criminal brain chip
Star Calendar Year <unbreak>8012</unbreak>
Guess~ Who~ I~ Am~
A Tea Society official.
A stubborn disciple of Sanctus Medicus.
Are you allowed weapons in a prison?
I am~ A stubborn disciple of Sanctus Medicus!

t_ch: 该名炼形者反复强调，自己并非药王信徒，只是药王秘传的试药志愿者…至于携带武器一事，他坚称这是身体的一部分。
t_en: This shapeshifter has repeatedly assured us that he is not a disciple of Sanctus Medicus, that he was merely a volunteer for a Disciples of Sanctus Medicus medical experiment... As for his weapons... he insists that they are part of his body.
Part three of the Growth series

t_ch: 肆意生长的生命力是不言自明的丰饶罪证
t_en: The ever-growing vitality is clear evidence of Abundance-related crimes.
Materials: Convict, weapons
Star Calendar Year <unbreak>8099</unbreak>
Guess~ Who~ I~ Am~
A failed evolution of Peppy.
A borisin.
A convict with extreme hair growth.
I am~ A convict with extreme hair growth!

t_ch: 据说是为了某个人，穿上了厚厚伪装，染上了疯狂，变成了狼人模样。
t_en: It is said that they wore a disguise for someone and were infected with a certain madness that turned them into a werewolf.
The Call of the Wild
When lies are made truth, the truth becomes lies
Materials: Convict
Period unknown

t_ch: 普通的卷轴，没有记载自过去到未来的一切记录。这意味着阅读其内容毋须支付任何代价——不会瞎，不会发疯，更不会失去生命。
t_en: It is an ordinary scroll without any record of the past or the future. You do not have to pay any price for reading it — you won't go blind, lose your mind, or be killed.

t_ch: 你打开卷轴，看到其中的仙舟文字飘逸如画。这很有可能是仙舟民常说的「书法」作品，但是数字化产物。
t_en: You open the scroll and find Xianzhou words written in artistic style inside. It is likely to be a work of calligraphy, as the Xianzhou citizens often call it, but it is in digital form.

t_ch: 观看这卷轴无法使你习得任何魔法，更无法增长能力，还是放弃吧。
t_en: You won't learn any magic or improve any of your skills by staring at the scroll. Just give up.

t_ch: 貌似卷轴，但实际上是可供悬浮阅读的柔性屏「展阅」，广受仙舟民喜爱。
t_en: It looks like a scroll, but it is actually a flexible display that can float in the air. It is popular among the Xianzhou citizens.

t_ch: 你听瓦尔特说起过，银河中的某个哲人国度将鸟笼视为冠冕——但他们究竟是怎么把脑袋塞进去的？
t_en: According to Welt, some philosopher country in the cosmos regards the birdcage as their crown. How on earth do they fit their head into the thing?

t_ch: 一座鸟笼，曾经关押着一只向往自由的灵魂。
t_en: A soul that yearned for freedom was once kept imprisoned in this birdcage.

t_ch: 鸟笼，看起来不太宜居。这可能正是你在其中找不到鸟的原因。
t_en: A birdcage that does not look very comfortable. That might be the reason why you can never find birds inside it.

t_ch: 据说仙舟民以宠物健壮庞然为美，可这笼子看起来实在是太小了。
t_en: It is said that Xianzhou citizens prefer large-sized pets that are strong. In light of that, this cage seems way too small.

t_ch: 笼中无鸟，这也许是对自由生命最好的隐喻。就让牢笼空置着吧！
t_en: A cage without a bird is probably the best metaphor for a life of freedom. Just let the cage be empty!

t_ch: 关于竞锋舰引擎运作的原理，不同人有过不同的猜想：中子碰撞、反物质、黑洞坍塌、虚数弹…或许，这些你熟悉的技术名词都无法解释它的科技。
t_en: Different people have various guesses about how the Skysplitter's engine operates: Neutron collisions, antimatter, collapsing black holes, Imaginary Bombs... Maybe even these familiar technical terms can't even explain its technology.

t_ch: 无论它是何种科技，在幻戏作品中，引擎总是舰船最薄弱的环节。就像是神话中无敌的英雄都有一处致命弱点，无敌的舰船也无法例外。
t_en: No matter what kind of technology it runs on, in immersias, the engine is always the weakest part of the ship. Just like how invincible heroes in mythology always have a fatal weakness — invincible ships are no exception.

t_ch: 按照常识来说，正在万丈高空上航行的舰船是不能容许有任何差错的。不过，任谁都会遐想「要是这艘船突然失去动力，云骑军究竟该如何空中大救援？」
t_en: Typically speaking, a ship flying at high altitude can't afford to make any mistakes. But, one can't help but think: "If this ship suddenly malfunctions, how exactly would the Cloud Knights mount a rescue?"

t_ch: 赶得早不如赶得巧，要不趁现在想象一下如何？
t_en: Well, since you're here already, why not take the opportunity to imagine how things will play out?
Attempt to imagine.
Please close your eyes.

t_ch: 为了方便你的代入，现在要为你构建一个紧张刺激的情景。请你在原地给自己添加一些*颠簸感*，毕竟现在这是失事的竞锋舰——
t_en: To make immersion easier, we need to build an exciting scenario. Please add a little turbulence to where you are now. After all, now the Skysplitter is facing a crash.

t_ch: 你是一名地衡司的王牌执事，得知有人打算*炸掉竞锋舰*，你千辛万苦登上竞锋舰后，犯人告诉你，他在竞锋引擎上安装了*定时炸弹*。
t_en: You are a highly decorated officer of the Realm-Keeping Commission who has heard that someone is planning to blow up the Skysplitter. After you painstakingly board the ship, the criminal informs you that he has already installed a time bomb in the engine.

t_ch: 一旦竞锋舰的航行速度低于某个数值就会引起爆炸…就在此时，你注意到竞锋舰引擎停止了运行，竞锋舰正在失速……
t_en: Once the Skysplitter's speed drops below a certain threshold, it will detonate the bomb... At this point, you notice that the Skysplitter's engine has stopped running, and it's losing speed...
Okay, please open your eyes.
This can't be real, can it?

t_ch: 请不要问如此破坏气氛的问题，专注于眼前！
t_en: Please don't ask such vibe-killing questions, pay attention!
Please tell me what I should do?

t_ch: 不愧是王牌执事，但是如何做，这需要你自己判断。
t_en: No doubt you're a top-class officer. But, regarding how to proceed, you must make your own judgment.

t_ch: 引擎停止运行，竞锋舰速度低于一定程度，定时炸弹就会爆炸；可要是定时炸弹到了一定时间，它也会爆炸，你会怎么做呢？
t_en: The engine has stopped functioning, and once the Skysplitter's speed drops below a certain threshold, the time bomb will explode. But it will also explode once it reaches a certain time. What will you do?
Disarm the bomb first, and solve the problem at its root.

t_ch: 你很冷静，也许这就是一针见血的解法——
t_en: You're very calm, so perhaps this is a straightforward solution...
Cut the blue wire.
Cut the red wire.
Cut both wires together.

t_ch: 你蒙对了，定时炸弹恼人的声音停了下来。
t_en: You guessed right — the annoying sound of the time bomb has stopped.

t_ch: 可是舰船的失速却愈演愈烈，你开始感觉到重力不在你的脚下——
t_en: But the ship's deceleration is intensifying. You begin to feel gravity slipping away from under your feet...
Restart the engine, and maintain cruising speed!

t_ch: 你很冷静，要是保持航速，应该还有拆除炸弹的时间！
t_en: You're very calm, if you can maintain cruising speed, there should still be time to disarm the bomb!
Activate backup power.
Immediately restart the engine.

t_ch: 引擎似乎没有按照你预想的情形发展，可恶，还能做些什么吧？
t_en: The engine restart did not go according to plan. Darn it, what can you do?

t_ch: 定时炸弹的声音越来越急促，不知是时间快到了，还是临近了最低速度——
t_en: The ticking from the time bomb becomes more pressing. Not sure if it's almost out of time or nearing the lowest possible speed...

t_ch: 先冷静一下，有尼古丁吗？
t_en: Need to calm down, anyone got a smoke?

t_ch: 不好意思，王牌执事可没有这样的习惯。你只能先吃个棒棒糖平替一下。
t_en: Sorry, high-achieving officers can't have such bad habits. You can only have a lollipop to calm down.

t_ch: 据说适当补充糖分，对需要动脑子的人来说很重要——
t_en: It's said that replenishing sugar is crucial for people who need to rack their brains.

t_ch: 意外发生了，在混乱之中，突如其来的杂物击中了你的后脑勺，你失去了意识……
t_en: The accident happens, and amongst the chaos, a sudden piece of debris strikes the back of your head. You lose consciousness...

t_ch: 很可惜，竞锋舰在天空中被炸成了肮脏的烟火。
t_en: Unfortunately, the Skysplitter is blasted into dirty fireworks in the sky.
The end.

t_ch: 想象体验就到此结束了。和平来之不易，请一定好好珍惜。
t_en: The imaginary experience ends here. Peace is hard-won, please treasure it.
No, I'm leaving!
Sure, you can return anytime.

t_ch: 数控屏显示有关竞锋舰的一切：剩余燃料、进出星槎数据、火力控制、雷达扫描、气象观测、各舱段的闸口通道。这里是竞锋舰的的控制台。
t_en: The numerical control screen displays all data regarding the Skysplitter: Remaining fuel, starskiff traffic data, firepower control, radar scans, weather report and access to each zone passage. This is the control console of the Skysplitter.

t_ch: 按道理来说，如果真是什么控制台的话，应该在舰桥那边，不在这里——
t_en: In theory, if it was really a control console, it should be at the bridge, not here...

t_ch: 「报告指挥中心！我们侧翼遭遇了敌军的偷袭！接下来该怎么做？船长？」
t_en: Report to command center! Enemy forces have attacked our flank! What are your next instructions? Captain?
The situation at hand is urgent!

t_ch: 开启曲率加速，逃离这片星系！
t_en: Full burn ahead, we need to escape this system!

t_ch: 在你不存在的记忆中，仿佛看到了一位目光坚定的军人——永远沉静，能够看到别人看不到的更远的地方。
t_en: In your non-existent memory, you seem to see a soldier with a firm gaze — forever silent, able to see a faraway place that's unseen by others.

t_ch: 你看到战争中必败的结局，伪装必胜的信念，并在绝望的战争中用尽手段去延续文明，现在你掌握了操作台。
t_en: You witness the inevitable defeat in the war, yet you maintain an unwavering belief in victory. Employing any and all means possible to extend the lifespan of civilization in this hopeless war, you now hold control of the console.
"Skysplitter, advance four!"

t_ch: 竞锋舰全员必须进入深海状态，竞锋舰也将达到光速的百分之十五。
t_en: All crew members of the Skysplitter must enter cryostasis. The Skysplitter will also reach fifteen percent of light speed.

t_ch: 进入休眠之前，你似乎听到有人在说「我想为人类文明保留一颗种子。」
t_en: Before entering hibernation, you seem to hear someone say that they wish to preserve a seed for human civilization.

t_ch: 立即开火还击！绝不手软！
t_en: Open fire immediately and retaliate! Show no mercy!

t_ch: 当然可以，船长。请您输入语音秘钥！
t_en: Of course, captain. Please enter your voice password.
"Blast them all to hell!"

t_ch: 话糙理不糙，但是下次设置语音秘钥时，请注意你的语言。
t_en: Harsh words, but logically sound. But please watch your language the next time you set a voice password.
"Sergeant, bring me my dang cannon!"

t_ch: 你好，我不叫二营长。另外，你的超弦轨道炮，已经拿来了。
t_en: Firstly, I'm not a Sergeant. Secondly, I've already brought your orbital cannon.
"Those who defy the Alliance shall perish!"

t_ch: 很好！此时此刻，你感觉到自己热血沸腾。
t_en: Awesome! At this moment, you feel your blood boiling.

t_ch: 那么你现在准备好了吗？
t_en: Are you ready?
Fireeeee!

t_ch: 一瞬间舰炮齐射，在炮弹的烟幕之中，敌我舰队都归于沉默。
t_en: The cannons fire in unison instantly, silencing both enemies and allied fleets with a cloud of smoke.

t_ch: 好了好了，幻想到此结束，希望你已经满足了。
t_en: All right, all right. The fantasy is over, I hope you had fun.
Retreat! Preserve our remaining forces!

t_ch: 战术性撤退也是一种智慧，此时的退避也是为了下一次的胜利。
t_en: Tactical retreat is also wise. This retreat is also for the next victory.
Chirr-rrr-rrr-rrp!
Chiirr-rrrp...
*howl loudly* Ahh-ahhhhh!
*howl loudly* <size=28>Ca-caw ca-caw!</size>
*tinge of irate silence*
*howl loudly* <size=36>Ca-caw ca-caw!</size>
Where are we flying to next?

t_ch: 我打算待会去小卖部整点油炸土豆条。
t_en: I'm thinking of going to the General Store and getting some fries.

t_ch: 你误会我了伙计，我说的是咱们这一辈子的终极目标。归根结底，活着是为了什么？
t_en: You've got me all wrong, buddy. I'm talking about the ultimate goal of our lives. Ultimately, what are we living for?

t_ch: 为了待会去小卖部整点油炸土豆条。
t_en: To go to the General Store later and get some fries.

t_ch: 一架古筝，典型的古国时期工艺。即便仙舟人已在宇宙中遨游了八千余载，他们仍未抛弃这种古老且优雅的爱好。
t_en: A guzheng, which is a typical instrument from the Primeval Imperium Age. Although the Xianzhou natives have dwelt in the universe for more than <unbreak>8000</unbreak> years, they still refuse to give up this ancient and elegant pastime.

t_ch: 一架古筝，配有完备的智能语音教学、智能语音激励、智能语音阴阳怪气等实用功能。可惜现在没电了。
t_en: A guzheng that features a comprehensive AI audio tutorial, AI audio encouragement function, AI audio sardonicism function, and many other useful functions. It's a pity that it is out of battery now.

t_ch: 成熟的古筝可以自己弹奏自己，而它正是一台成熟的古筝。
t_en: Sophisticated guzhengs can play themselves, and this is one of them.

t_ch: 有没有这样一种可能——这台古筝底部的支架实为可以随意屈伸的机械四肢，而这台古筝实为某种造型独特的机械宠物？
t_en: Could the stand be a flexible mechanical arm, and the guzheng be a mech-pet with a unique design?

t_ch: 生活最大的乐趣是什么？
t_en: What's life's greatest pleasure?
Admiring artistic images of birds.

t_ch: 你误会我了伙计，我是说世界这么大，肯定有什么可以震撼心灵的东西！
t_en: You've got me all wrong, buddy. I'm saying, the world is so big, there must be something that'll blow your mind!

t_ch: 欣赏超赞的鸟类艺术照。
t_en: Admire stunning artistic images of birds.
Well *avian swear word*, why don't you post 'em then!

t_ch: 你听到快递箱里传来窸窸窣窣的异响。你猜不到是什么生物——也可能不是——在箱子里乱动。
t_en: You hear a rustling noise coming from the courier package. You wonder what kind of creature — or thing — is squirming in the package.

t_ch: 这只快递箱声称自己装着「玩具」。它最好是。
t_en: The label on the package shows that it contains some toys. It better be.

t_ch: 被随意码放的快递箱，很可能是某人冲动的代价。
t_en: The randomly placed courier package is likely to be the result of someone's impulsiveness.

t_ch: 被遗弃的快递箱。你根本想象不到它的主人究竟多么健忘，或者多么有钱。
t_en: This is an abandoned courier package. Its owner must be very forgetful or very rich.

t_ch: 一只被遗弃的快递包装盒可怜巴巴地躺在你面前。在完成了它存护货物的使命后，安然吐出了腹中最后一口气。哦对了，它还有遗言：「小心、轻放」。
t_en: There is an abandoned courier package lying forlornly in front of you. It breathes its last after completing the mission of storing the goods. By the way, these are its last words: "Handle with care."

t_ch: 仙舟的物流行业兴盛发达，如同血液中充沛的红细胞奔向这座吞天之舰的各处——而这只箱子正是其中之一。
t_en: The logistics industry on the Xianzhou thrives, as things are being transferred to all parts of this tremendous ship like the red blood cells in the body; this courier package is one of them.

t_ch: 你想起那些飞在空中运送货物的机巧鸟——若是它们送货时不巧爪子一滑，若是有行人不巧经过它们的下方…你摇了摇头，不敢再想下去。
t_en: The image of cycranes that deliver goods in the air pops up in your mind. What if the goods slip off their claws when they are flying? What if a pedestrian happens to pass by below them? You shake your head, dreading to continue the train of thought.

t_ch: 「请站稳扶好，禁止嬉戏打闹」。每一条看似废话的规则的背后或许都是真实而惨痛的案例——你不禁想象没有站稳扶好的人后来掉到哪里去了。
t_en: "Please stand firm and hold on. No fooling around." A real and painful incident may be concealed behind every seemingly trivial rule — you can't help but imagine where those that didn't stand firm ended up falling.

t_ch: 这与停靠在星槎海码头的星槎相比，似乎是多了些玦轮。混合动力的星槎引起了一轮星槎革命——超远的行程，超低的能耗，遥遥领先。
t_en: Compared to the starskiffs docked at Starskiff Haven, this one seems to have a few more jade wheels. The hybrid-powered starskiff has sparked a starskiff revolution — ultra-long haul, ultra-low energy consumption and industry-leading.

t_ch: 曾经有名飞行士驾驶着这样的竞速级星槎，只用<unbreak>12</unbreak>秒差距就完成了灰穹航线。这件壮举也成为了那名飞行士一辈子的谈资。
t_en: There used to be a pilot who flew a racing-class starskiff and made the Gray Sky Route in twelve parsecs. This magnificent feat became a lifelong bragging right for the pilot.

t_ch: 人们总说「生活在别处」，但美食往往也在别处。难道仙舟之外的零食会更好吃一些吗？不一定吧，但是它一定会更贵一些。
t_en: People always say that "life is elsewhere," but so is good food. Could snacks beyond Xianzhou be tastier? I'm not sure, but they're probably more expensive.

t_ch: 有人赞美食品工业化！它让商店里的所有食物都达到了「可以入口」的标准线。也有人诅咒食品工业化！它让商店里的所有食物都达到了「可以入口」的标准线。
t_en: Some laud the industrialization of food! It has allowed all store-sold food to attain the "edible" standard. Others curse the industrialization of food! It has allowed all store-sold food to attain the "edible" standard.

t_ch: 有食客信誓旦旦称，这些来自匹诺康尼的美味小食没有梦的味道。看来，美梦也有保质期。
t_en: There are customers who would swear by their mothers that these delicious snacks from Penacony don't taste like dreams. It appears that even dreams have best-by dates.

t_ch: 匹诺康尼的食品厂商为了罗浮本地食客的口味和习惯，特地开发了「陈婆豆腐」口味的爆米花…销量惨淡。
t_en: To cater to the tastes and habits of the Luofu's customers, Penacony's food vendors specially developed popcorn in the Granny Chen's Tofu flavor... Its sales were dismal.

t_ch: 希望未来在匹诺康尼的零售商店里，不会出现苏打豆汁儿口味的限量款苏乐达。
t_en: The hope is that Penacony's snack stores won't carry limited-edition mung bean soda flavored SoulGlad in the future.

t_ch: 吧台上陈列了不同口味的苏乐达。冰点款、经典款、劲爽款、无气款…唯独没有无糖款。看来苏乐达™也有它的底线，唯有糖浆不可妥协。
t_en: SoulGlad of various flavors line the bar top: Subzero, Classic, Power Refresh, Uncarbonated... Only the sugar-free variety is missing. It appears there is a bottom line that SoulGlad™ won't compromise on, especially when it's about syrup.

t_ch: 没有准备冰柜，这是苏乐达在仙舟销量不好的主要原因。
t_en: There are no refrigeration appliances prepared — this is the main reason that SoulGlad sales aren't doing well on the Xianzhou.

t_ch: 豆知识，苏乐达™早些年为了抢占仙舟饮料市场，曾用过「好梦气泡饮」的注册名，但显然它不如「苏乐达」朗朗上口。
t_en: Trivia: In the earlier years, SoulGlad™ once used the registered name "Sweet Dreams Soda" to try to capture Xianzhou's beverage market, but it was obviously not as catchy as SoulGlad.

t_ch: 你本应该看着这两只机巧鸟产生哲学的思考「鸟为什么会飞？」但你观察了一段时后，改变了思考命题——「这俩傻鸟为什么不会飞？」
t_en: Gazing at the two cycranes, you are supposed to philosophically ponder the question: Why do birds fly? But after a period of further observation, you decide to change your inquiry: Why can't these two dumb birds fly?

t_ch: 曾经有人把机械臂拼装星槎的视频放到网上，由于过程因极其解压而大受好评，登上了首页推荐——精确，稳定，可控，简直是心灵按摩。
t_en: Someone posted a video of a robot arm attached to a starskiff on social media. The whole DIY process was so de-stressing to viewers that it went viral and was trending on the homepage — precise, stable, controllable, like a massage for the soul.

t_ch: 对于那艘星槎来说，它会觉得这是一种被拿捏的感觉吗？
t_en: As for that starskiff, would it have felt like it was being manipulated and toyed with?

t_ch: 在不同文明中，设计自动化工程的设计师都有共同的特性——就是懒。自动化设计的初衷都是为了更好地偷懒，所以换句话说，偷懒是科技进步的重要助力。
t_en: In different civilizations, automation designers all share a common trait — indolence. The objective of automotive design is to do less and more efficiently. In other words, laziness is the key driver of the advancement of technology.

t_ch: 竞锋舰虽然吨位较小，但是天才的工造司设计师却在它的身上实现了主流的大吨位配置——大口径主炮，数量众多的速射副炮，看啊！这就是超强火力给云骑军的自信。
t_en: The Skysplitter may be smaller in tonnage, but the genius designers at the Artisanship Commission managed to equip it with features that are available on larger ships — a large-caliber main gun and numerous rapid-fire auxiliary guns. Behold! This overwhelming firepower is what gives the Cloud Knights their confidence.

t_ch: 工造司的设计师说「要有炮塔」，于是炮台出现。工造司的设计师说「要有更多的炮塔」，于是更多的炮台出现。工程师说「还不够」，于是你看到了竞锋舰。
t_en: The designers at the Artisanship Commission said, "Let there be turrets," and there were. The designers at the Artisanship Commission said, "Let there be more turrets," and there were more. Then the engineers said, "It's not enough," and thus you see the Skysplitter.

t_ch: 数量众多的炮塔，铆接的工艺技术，蒸汽机的审美传统，刚性悬挂…美哉！壮哉！多就是好，大就是美！如果你失败了，那是因为你的炮塔还不够多！
t_en: Numerous turrets, riveting craftsmanship, the traditional aesthetics of the steam engines, rigid suspensions... How beautiful! How magnificent! More is superior, and bigger is grander! The only reason for your failure is not enough turrets!

t_ch: 真理就在射程范围之内，这是寰宇皆通的准则。
t_en: Truth lies within shot range, this is a universal principle.

t_ch: 一个人的一生中，也许会迷惑，也许会恐惧、会埋怨。但他/她只要扣响舰船上的炮塔，就会从中收获信心与力量，他/她会始终热爱帝弓信仰，他/她会始终热爱多炮塔！
t_en: In one's life, there may be confusion, fear or resentment. But as long as they fire the ship's turrets, they will gain confidence and strength. They will always cherish the faith in the Reignbow and love having multiple turrets.

t_ch: 如果你提议在星穹列车的车顶也安装几门巨炮，不知道帕姆会不会同意呢？杨叔应该会投下赞同票吧，对此，你满怀信心！
t_en: If you suggest installing several mega cannons on the roof of the Express, you wonder if Pom-Pom will agree. Mr. Yang will probably cast a vote of approval — you're confident about this!

t_ch: 快递箱，备注一栏填写了：「拜托，千万别把货物名称写在上面」。
t_en: There is a remark written on the label of the courier package: "Please do not put the name of the goods on this."

t_ch: 你把目光上移，在信息栏里看到了「机巧人偶，陪伴型」。箱子上坑坑洼洼的砸痕证明了收货人的愤怒。
t_en: You move your eyes up at the information column and see a phrase that reads, "Ingenium Puppet, designed for companionship" The battered condition of the package indicates that it has been smashed repeatedly by its angry recipient.

s_en: Cycrane with a sense of duty
t_ch: 你好你好，我总感觉有人藏在这里，能拜托你找一下吗？
t_en: Hello, hello. I keep getting the feeling that someone's hiding here. Can you help me find that person?
What do you mean?

s_en: Cycrane with a sense of duty
t_ch: 就是字面上的意思，我感觉有人藏在这里，并且一直在暗中观察着我，这让我鸟有些紧张，可是我找不到。
t_en: It's exactly as I said, I think that someone's hiding here and watching me from the shadows. It's gotten my steel feathers somewhat ruffled, but I can't seem to find anything.
Why aren't you looking then?

s_en: Cycrane with a sense of duty
t_ch: 我找不到，所以才来问你。我感觉有人藏在这里，并且一直在暗中观察着我，这让我鸟有些紧张。
t_en: I can't find anything, that's why I'm asking you. I get the feeling that someone's hiding here and watching me from the shadows — it's gotten me a little anxious.

s_en: Cycrane with a sense of duty
t_ch: 就当是顺便做件好事好了，你可以借助我这鸟随意观察，但是发现了*藏起来的人*就请带我过去。
t_en: Just see it as doing a good deed in passing. You can borrow my bird and take a look around. Once you've found that hidden person, please bring me along.

t_ch: 一只快递箱，以不太体面的方式出现在了地面上。原本尖尖的边角瘪了进去。
t_en: There is a courier package in a pathetic state on the ground. The edges of the package are all indented.

t_ch: 它没有伤到谁吧？如果它太坚固，那么受伤的也许会是某人；如果它不太坚固，那么受伤的也许会是货物…唉，做快递盒真难。
t_en: It didn't hurt anyone, did it? If it's too sturdy, it might injure someone, but if it's too fragile, the goods inside might be damaged... Alas, it's not easy to be a courier package.
Tsk, I've been discovered.

t_ch: 你不会一直躲在这里吧？
t_en: You haven't been hiding here all this time, have you?
You know me?
It's me, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 我看到了，你在下面控制着这鸟。
t_en: I see. You were controlling this bird from below.

t_ch: 你不是在飞霄将军那里？
t_en: Weren't you at General Feixiao's?
I come and go as I please.

t_ch: 下次就没有这么简单了。
t_en: It won't be so easy next time.
There's a next time?

t_ch: 只要你找不到，就没有下次。
t_en: There won't be, if you can't find me.
I found you. Where's my reward?
There's no reward!
So long, perceptive one.

t_ch: 你见过许多快递盒，但从没一只像眼前这样，它在微微颤抖，犹如雨巷里被遗弃的小狗。「别、别过来！」它好像在对你说话。
t_en: You have come across many courier packages, but none of them is like the one before you. It trembles slightly like an abandoned puppy on a rainy day. "D—Don't come closer!" It seems to be talking to you.

t_ch: 「你吃了什么不干净的东西？你为什么在不停打颤？」你无声发问。
t_en: "Did you eat things that had gone bad? Why are you trembling?" You ask in your mind.

t_ch: 「没、没什么。」纸盒竭力装作一副若无其事地样子。但颤抖出卖了它内里的恐慌。
t_en: "I—I'm okay." The package tries its best to look fine, but its trembling reveals its anxiety.

t_ch: 「一只手机罢了…」快递盒细声解释，向后微微退却。
t_en: "It's just a phone..." The package explains in a feeble voice while backing away slightly.

t_ch: 「真的吗？我不信。」也许是炸弹上的钟表，也许是被不幸封进箱子的小动物，也许…某种更隐秘的东西。你的好奇心驱使着你，为了仙舟安危，你必须知道真相。
t_en: "Really? I don't think so." Perhaps, what's inside is the clock on a bomb, a poor animal, or something even more mysterious. As your curiosity gets the better of you, you are bent on finding out the truth for the safety of the Xianzhou.

t_ch: 你上前一步，正要摸上纸盒的封条时，它突然爆发出一阵更剧烈的晃动，再也没有任何反应。
t_en: You take a step forward. Just as your hand is about to touch the tape on the package, the package starts shaking vigorously before it stops moving.

t_ch: 你被吓了一跳，难熬的心痒瞬间烟消云散。无论里面原本装着什么，它都再也动弹不得了。咱们还是别打开它比较好。
t_en: Horrified, your heightened curiosity dissipates all at once. No matter what's inside, it's best that you stay away from the package. No one should ever open it.

s_en: Cycrane with a sense of duty
t_ch: 怎么会有人不吃不喝不睡觉一直躲在那种地方啊？
t_en: Why would someone hide in such a place without food, drink, or sleep?

s_en: Cycrane with a sense of duty
t_ch: 自从找到那个怪人之后，我的心里舒坦了不少，这是你应得的奖励。看来我这鸟，今晚能睡个好觉了！谢谢你！
t_en: I've felt much better since we found that weirdo. Here's your reward. I will sleep soundly tonight! Thank you!

t_ch: 一只精美的纸鸢，位列仙舟孩子最爱玩具排行榜第二，仅次于合金超可动神霄雷府总司驱雷掣电追魔扫秽天君。
t_en: A beautiful kite is the second most popular toy among Xianzhou children, just behind the alloy Lightning-Wielding Thunder-Clapping Spirit-Squashing Lord.

t_ch: 精美的纸鸢，最早被用于纪念天舶司阵亡的飞行士。如今，仙舟人已将这种慎终追远的仪式情怀融入到平凡的日常生活中。
t_en: Kites were first used to commemorate the fallen pilots of the Sky-Faring Commission. Now, the Xianzhou natives have incorporated the remembrance of the heroes in the past into their daily lives.

t_ch: 有经验的仙舟人会告诉你：当纸鸢飞在天上时，远离它的线——据说在强风加持下，纸鸢线足以将疾驰的星槎一分为二。
t_en: An elderly Xianzhou native would advise you to stay away from the thread when a kite is flying in the sky. It is said that the thread will be powerful enough to split a speeding starskiff into two with the help of a blustery wind.

t_ch: 据说罗浮的玩具商已经研发出了遥控纸鸢，但许多纸鸢爱好者将其斥为「亵渎」。
t_en: Rumor has it that a toy manufacturer in the Luofu has invented remote control kites. Nonetheless, many kite enthusiasts consider the invention as a desecration of the tradition.
Take a look at this.

t_ch: 好像是…「枘凿六合Remake」的广告……
t_en: This looks like... a Hexanexus: Remake ad...

t_ch: 这种广告放竞锋舰的浮梯里？
t_en: This ad's placement is inside the Skysplitter's levitator?

t_ch: 家长们避之不及的东西，你们送到小朋友的眼皮底下？挣钱，咱得有个底线。
t_en: Putting something that parents avoid right under the noses of children? This is a new low to making money.

t_ch: 真的是！简直荼毒正常人的心灵。
t_en: Seriously! Practically poison for the soul!

t_ch: 诶，你也评评理，你说说看「枘凿六合」的广告放在这里合适吗？
t_en: Hey, you say something too, do you think it's appropriate to have a Hexanexus ad here?
Of course!

t_ch: 哈？你再想想！我觉得你不配使用浮梯。
t_en: Hah? Think more seriously! I don't think you're fit to use the levitator.
Of course not!

t_ch: 你看看，明眼人就是这样的。
t_en: There, the bright-eyed stranger has spoken.

t_ch: 前些天我不想扫兴，但是我得批评一下咱们的竞锋舰的管理水平了。浮梯里张贴低俗露骨的游戏广告，来看比赛的有这么多孩子，在浮梯里不得尴尬死？
t_en: I didn't want to dampen the mood the other day, but I really have to lodge a complaint about the management quality of our Skysplitter. Such a crass game ad plastered in the levitator, and so many kids watch the match. I'd die of embarrassment in the levitator!

t_ch: 家长、学校都在教孩子积极向上，远离游戏，你们把这些乱七八糟的东西贴在眼皮底下，你们这是在犯罪啊！试想一下，你自己的孩子看到了，该怎么办！
t_en: Parents and teachers are trying to teach kids to be more positive and stay away from games, yet you lot dare plaster such rubbish right in front of us. It's a crime, I say! Think about what you would do if your own child saw that!
...It would be fine, I suppose?

t_ch: 你走开，我不想和你们这些帮凶站在一起。
t_en: Go away, I do not wish to be seen alongside the uncouth likes of you.
Get Hexanexus out of the Skysplitter!

t_ch: 没错没错，不仅要滚出竞锋舰，他们应该滚出仙舟，应该坐牢！
t_en: Yeah! Not just that, they should get out of the Xianzhou too, and be arrested!

t_ch: 您说的对，您说的有理，咱们这就将它撤下来。
t_en: Yes, yes, you're absolutely right, we'll tear it down right now.

t_ch: 呼——你长舒一口气，终于看清楚了枘凿六合新广告的全貌。那是个*一丝不挂的三阶魔方*，魔方秘社竟然做出这种广告，真是太狂了！
t_en: *pheeew* You exhale a drawn-out breath, finally clearly seeing the Hexanexus ad in all its brand-new glory. It is a stark naked three-phase cube. To think the Hex Club even came up with such an ad, outrageous!

t_ch: 继续听下去也只是头昏脑涨，在你不知不觉间，家长已经带着孩子离开了。
t_en: Listening to them anymore will only get your head spinning even harder. Before you realize it, the parent has already left with his child.
(Hexanexus... *sigh*...)

t_ch: 很可能是一只饭盒，但绝不是盲盒——至少不该是。
t_en: It might be a lunchbox, but never a mystery box — or at least it shouldn't be.

t_ch: 很可能是一只饭盒，也可能装着饼干等零食，还可能装满了某人祖母的针线。
t_en: It might be a lunchbox or a box that contains snacks like cookies or a sewing kit of someone's grandmother.

t_ch: 一只饭盒，装着许多你想吃却吃不到的仙舟美食。
t_en: The lunchbox contains lots of Xianzhou delicacies that you crave but cannot have.

t_ch: 现在只是一只饭盒，但在把食物放进去之前可以是任何容器。
t_en: It is a lunchbox now, but it can be a vessel of any type before food is put into it.

t_ch: 参加比赛的选手们自发地做着热身运动，也许他们需要有人指导一番。既然如此，那这个人为什么不可以是你呢？
t_en: The participating fighters are all warming up at their own pace. Perhaps they need someone to lead them. If that's the case, why can't that be you?
I'll lead the exercise!

t_ch: 大家相信你的专业水平，欢迎{NICKNAME}莅临指导！
t_en: Everyone trusts your professionalism, welcome {NICKNAME}, please lead them!
I'm just here to take a look.
It's fine, whenever you're free.

t_ch: 看见大家没精打采的，先来个下马威吧！
t_en: Since everyone's looking sluggish, let's start off with a bang!
Attention! At ease!

t_ch: 很好。这些人中，有人目光如炬，有人目光呆滞，你应该起个带头作用。
t_en: Very good. Among them, some of their eyes shine with radiance, some others vacantly void. You should get them started off.
Neck exercise! Ready, go!

t_ch: 双手叉腰，低头，仰头，向左向右，开始！
t_en: Hands on hips, lower your head, raise it up, rotate it left and right, let's go!
One-two-three-four, two-two-three-four...
Everyone is warming up in an orderly fashion.

t_ch: 哎呀，好像有人偷懒，这里就需要你严厉地指导一下了。
t_en: Oh dear, looks like there is someone slacking off and in dire need of your strict guidance.

t_ch: 那边的那个，注意手上动作！
t_en: That one, over there! Watch how you move your hands!

t_ch: 别以为我没有看见，做到位！
t_en: Don't think I'm not watching! Let's do it properly!

t_ch: 偷懒的人也调整了自己的动作，看来大家都进入状态了。
t_en: The slacker has fixed up their movements. Looks like everyone is in shape.
Chest expansion exercise! Ready, go!
One-two-three-four, two-two-three-four...

t_ch: 哎呀，好像有人偷懒，这里就需要你严厉地指导一下了。
t_en: Oh dear, looks like there is someone slacking off and in dire need of your strict guidance.

t_ch: 骗我可以，但是别骗你自己！
t_en: You can try and fool me, but don't try and fool yourself!

t_ch: 动作不到位，达不到效果的。
t_en: Your stance is off, and that won't get you anywhere.

t_ch: 偷懒的人也调整了自己的动作，看来大家都进入状态了。
t_en: The slacker has fixed up their movements. Looks like everyone is in shape.
Leg lunges! Get ready, go!
One-two-three-four, two-two-three-four...

t_ch: 哎呀，好像有人偷懒，这里就需要你严厉地指导一下了。
t_en: Oh dear, looks like there is someone slacking off and in dire need of your strict guidance.

t_ch: 那边的那个，注意手上动作！
t_en: That one, over there! Watch how you move your hands!

t_ch: 别以为我没有看见，做到位！
t_en: Don't think I'm not watching! Let's do it properly!

t_ch: 偷懒的人也调整了自己的动作，看来大家都进入状态了。
t_en: The slacker has fixed up their movements. Looks like everyone is in shape.
Boxing practice, let's begin!

t_ch: 很好，这样做才算是真正的舒展了肌肉，打开了关节。
t_en: Very good, this is what a REAL warm-up is like — muscles stretched, joints flossed.

t_ch: 好像有人偷懒，需要你指导一下。
t_en: Looks like someone's slacking off. They require guidance.

t_ch: 骗我可以，但是别骗你自己！
t_en: You can try and fool me, but don't try and fool yourself!

t_ch: 动作不到位，达不到效果的。
t_en: Your stance is off, and that won't get you anywhere.

t_ch: 偷懒的人也调整了自己的动作，看来大家都进入状态了。
t_en: The slacker has fixed up their movements. Looks like everyone is in shape.

t_ch: 多亏了你，大家找到了正确的练习节奏。此时你可以卸下责任，悄然离开了。
t_en: It's all thanks to you that everyone got in the rhythm of doing it right. You can now unburden yourself of your duty and quietly leave.
(Observe a bit more.)

t_ch: 不好意思问一下，请问你是谁啊？
t_en: Sorry to bother, but who are you?
Call me the Galactic Baseballer.
I never leave my name when doing good deeds.

t_ch: 我只是个路过的教练罢了。
t_en: I'm just a coach who happened to pass by.
Eh? Who? Should I know you?
(Depart with panache and style)

t_ch: 事了拂衣去，深藏身与名。谢谢你，体操{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}。
t_en: Away like a whisk of wind, leaving nary a name but a face. Thank you, {F#Miss}{M#Mister} Exercise.

t_ch: 将手臂抬高，两手平举成一水平线，准备开始！
t_en: Raise your arms up high, hands in a horizontal line, and get ready!

t_ch: 腿往前迈，弯曲呈<unbreak>90</unbreak>度，身体同时往下压并保持伸直。准备开始！
t_en: Move your leg forward and bend it at a <unbreak>90</unbreak>-degree angle. Push down with your body and keep straight. Get ready!

t_ch: 你摇摇头悄然离开此处。毕竟，这里的选手并不需要认识你，他们只用考虑如何完成锻炼就可以了。
t_en: You shake your head and leave silently. The contestants here don't need to know who you are, after all. All they need is to think about how they are going to complete their training.
Shout loudly for more power!
How can you throw a punch with such a soft voice?

t_ch: 我嗓子快哑了…有点缺氧。
t_en: My throat is hoarse... I think I'm lacking air.
I understand the principle, but it's just a tad noisy.

t_ch: 武功无坚不破，唯快不破。
t_en: Martial arts are indomitable, except when faced against speed.
I beg to differ: Sheer strength can overpower ten skilled fighters.

t_ch: 倘若我用化劲，又当如何？
t_en: And what if I neutralized your force, what then?
Nothing more than a charlatan blowing hot air.
Sink your shoulders, drop your elbows, tuck in your chest and arch your back...
Got it?
I only remember half of it.
I've already forgotten half of it.
Great, forget the moves you've learned.
If I forget everything, can I get a refund for the school fees?

t_ch: 我很看好那个用大剑的。
t_en: I have a good feeling about the one who uses the huge sword.
Darn it, I don't think I can beat her.

t_ch: 被那把剑砍到可不得了…
t_en: Getting hit by that sword will be disastrous...
That white-haired one is a senior executive in the IPC...

t_ch: 那么大的领导也来参赛？
t_en: Even the management is here to compete?

t_ch: 这有什么？你看那灰毛教练…
t_en: So what? Look at that gray-haired coach...
Been buddies with our general for ages.

t_ch: 这些大人物武功都这么好吗？
t_en: Are these big shots all really that skilled in martial arts?
It must be because of their self-discipline!
Fan lightsticks, fan graphic tees, neon fan signs...
Is the banner ready as well?
They are all ready!
Reporting to the team leader! I have a question!
Will cheering props be included in the team-building budget?
Don't fuss over such trivial matters!
You gotta think bigger!
Director Topaz is so skilled...
She won't hurt other contestants, right?
Don't worry, she knows what she's doing.
That's good, that's good...

t_ch: 毕竟咱们是来做宣传的。
t_en: After all, we're here for the publicity.
There's no need to activate the Cornerstone, is there?
Tailored just for this competition!
Clash between modernity and tradition!
The combination of technology and martial arts!
Buy now for a <unbreak>60%</unbreak> discount!
Might as well use an Aurumaton Gatekeeper.
I practiced my Ironhide skill for naught then.
Firing missiles also considered martial arts?
That's so cool! I want a pink paint job too!

t_ch: 为啥不偷学点仙舟武术？
t_en: Why not secretly learn some Xianzhou martial arts?

t_ch: 他们说要练气得有丹腑。
t_en: They say you need Core Esse to cultivate your Qi.

t_ch: 气？我们不是用肺呼吸么？
t_en: Qi? Isn't that something we breathe into our lungs?
Yeah, what exactly is Core Esse?
I don't know.
Is the opponent a Belobogian?
Yes, the director is quite familiar with that place.
Don't bring up sensitive topics!
Where is Belobog?
It's my first time hearing too...
Doesn't matter, they are going up against the IPC.

t_ch: 对！公司没少挤兑咱联盟。
t_en: Yeah! The IPC has been blatantly exploiting our Alliance.

t_ch: 只要打公司就是我亲兄弟！
t_en: As long as they are fighting the IPC, they are my brothers!
We stan Belobog!

t_ch: 那个红发小子打得不错。
t_en: The red-haired boy has some moves.

t_ch: 我还以为他撑不了几个回合。
t_en: I thought he wouldn't last more than a few rounds.

t_ch: 年纪不大，拳法却很老练。
t_en: Young in age, but seasoned in boxing.
What a promising talent...
Didn't you say it was a guaranteed win? It's an L!

t_ch: 没法翻盘了！已经结束了！
t_en: There's no way to turn the tide! It's over!
*Xianzhou profanity* I need a refund!
Never trusting insider information again.

t_ch: 那边就是卢卡的房间吧？
t_en: Is Luka's room that way?
Don't be so obvious, come closer.
That Boothill is pretty cool.
But he's a wanted criminal by the IPC...
Hey! Not our problem!
Just being handsome is enough!

t_ch: 听说巡海游侠都是高手！
t_en: I hear that the Galaxy Rangers are all experts!
Those steel abs look so sick.
The Rangers are the epitome of romance!

t_ch: 不知道我本事是否够格。
t_en: Not sure if my skills meet the mark.
Boothill is just too strong!

t_ch: 怕什么，十步之外才枪快！
t_en: There's nothing to fear. Beyond ten steps, the gun is always quicker!

t_ch: 哈哈，十步内枪又准又快。
t_en: Haha, a gun is quick and accurate within ten steps, though.

t_ch: 你说飞剑强还是子弹强？
t_en: Which do you think is stronger, flying swords or bullets?
Definitely bullets...
Flying swords are cumbersome and get in the way!
But the direction of the flying swords can be controlled!

t_ch: 那用手枪发射微型飞剑…
t_en: Then use a pistol to fire miniature flying swords...
You're a genius.
Where's your martial sportsmanship? I'm still charging up!
Victory is my martial sportsmanship!

t_ch: 你们俩歇会吧，闹一天了。
t_en: Take a break, you two. You guys have been fooling around for the whole day.
Should we go and comfort him?

t_ch: 还是让他自己静一静吧。
t_en: Let's give him some space!

t_ch: 乡亲们，战斗还没有结束！
t_en: Folks, the battle isn't over yet!

t_ch: 现在大家都去演武仪典官网！
t_en: Everyone, please head to the official website of the Wardance!
Cast your votes on the "Popularity Revival" page!

t_ch: 你慢点说，我要先点哪里？
t_en: Hold up, where do I click?
Xianzhou's forums are so complicated...

t_ch: 卢卡选手需要您的支持！
t_en: Luka needs your support!
He needs your precious vote!
Luka "Strongarm"! Invincible fists!
Luka's showdown with the Knight of Beauty...
I can't wait!
Boxing versus marksmanship, I can't wait!
The Preservation versus the Beauty, can't wait!
Redhead versus redhead! Let's go!

t_ch: 油润酥脆的包子，静静地躺在散发着热气的笼屉里。
t_en: A soft and fluffy bun is lying peacefully in the hot steamer.

t_ch: 似乎有些包子还在下层的笼屉里忍受着煎熬，就像曾坐在桑拿房里的你，或者其他人。
t_en: Just like you and others who once sat in a sauna, some buns are still undergoing the trial of heat in the lower levels of the steamer.

t_ch: 如果你跑得足够快，或者武艺高强到可以单挑整个仙舟联盟的云骑军，那么你就可以吃掉笼屉里的包子——无需支付任何费用。
t_en: If you are a fast runner or someone powerful enough to fend off all the Cloud Knights of Xianzhou Alliance single-handedly, you are free to have all the buns in the steamer without paying for them.
It'll work out.
It's because we are all rooting for him!
Fight for the goddess of Idrila!
May the Beauty remain eternal!

t_ch: 银枝大人武艺盖世无双！
t_en: Lord Argenti's martial arts are unparalleled!
Defend the beauty of Lord Argenti!
There are quite a number of fans!
Luka will definitely win the repechage.
I'm willing to be a vegetarian for life!
In exchange for Luka to reach the top!
Look, it's Luka!
All the best Luka! I'm rooting for you!
Luka is the best!
Luka "Strongarm"! Invincible fists!
He really won!
Can we take a picture together?
The match was so exciting!
Luka "Strongarm"! Invincible fists!
Superb! Your moves were incredible!
There's no doubt you're the one I'm rooting for!
Lord Argenti is just too handsome!

t_ch: 最后那番话实在发人深省！
t_en: That last remark really touched my heart!
I've already memorized it.

t_ch: 往后这就是我的人生格言了！
t_en: From now on, this will be my life motto!
Luka back in! What a joyous occasion!
I'll treat you later!

t_ch: 太好了，还能再看他比赛！
t_en: Awesome, I can still watch him compete!
I also want to join the support group!
Me too! Me too!

t_ch: 呜…他打赢复活赛太好了。
t_en: *sob* ...It's great that he won the repechage.
Boohoo...

t_ch: 呜呜呜…我的眼泪停不下来…
t_en: *sobbing* ...I can't stop my tears...

t_ch: 这是大喜的日子，你们不许哭！
t_en: Today is a joyous day, so stop your tears!
That ancient and steadfast design...
That powerful design...

t_ch: 确实，有一种历经岁月的美。
t_en: Actually, it has a beauty that has endured the test of time.

t_ch: 光站在那里就让人安芯。
t_en: It gives one peace just by standing there.

t_ch: 他拳头力道跟星槎似的。
t_en: The power of his fists is just like starskiffs.
A single punch almost sent me to the afterlife.
After all, he's not called "Strongarm" for nothing!
